metadata.title: Home Renewal | Renovations & Real Estate
metadata.description: Premium property renovations, real estate services and concrete screeds. We transform your space into modern living.

hero.subtitle: HOME RENEWAL
hero.title: Transforming spaces into places you want to live
hero.description: Comprehensive renovations, real estate services and premium surface finishes. From vision to realization.

services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.title: What we do for you
services.description: We offer comprehensive solutions from renovations through real estate services to unique concrete screeds.

renovation.title: Property Renovations
renovation.description: Complete transformation of apartments, houses and commercial spaces. From design to realization.

realEstate.title: Real Estate
realEstate.description: Professional real estate services — sales, purchases and consulting. We find the right property for you.

developers.title: For Developers
developers.description: Cooperation with development projects from study to final approval. A reliable partner for your projects.

concreteScreeds.title: Concrete Screeds
concreteScreeds.description: Premium concrete screeds for modern interiors. Unique appearance and high durability.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: We build as if we wanted to live there ourselves
about.description: We are a team of professionals focused on quality renovations and real estate services. We keep our word, deadlines and budget. Every project is managed by an architect, project manager and site supervisor.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: We listen to your ideas and together design the optimal solution.

step2.title: Design & Planning
step2.description: Our architect prepares a complete design including visualizations and budget.

step3.title: Realization
step3.description: Site supervisor oversees quality and deadline compliance.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: We deliver the finished project in agreed quality and on time.

references.label: REFERENCES
references.title: Our Projects
references.description: Take a look at selected projects we have completed for our clients.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: We'll be happy to help you with renovations, property sales or concrete screeds. Contact us and we'll figure it out together.

footer.description: Premium renovations, real estate services and concrete screeds.

hero.label: RENOVATIONS
hero.title: Complete Property Renovations
hero.description: We transform your apartment, house or commercial space into a modern place for living and working. From the first design to key handover.

apartments.title: Apartment Renovations
apartments.description: We can complete a full apartment renovation in as little as 4 weeks. We deliver the highest quality, always on time.

houses.title: House Renovations
houses.description: Professional renovation of family houses. We breathe new life into your home and restore its beauty.

commercial.title: Commercial Spaces
commercial.description: Renovation of offices, shops and other commercial spaces with emphasis on functionality and design.

attic.title: Attic Conversions
attic.description: We transform unused attic space into full-fledged living space with maximum use of space.

cta.title: Considering a renovation?
cta.description: We'll be happy to help with planning and realization. Contact us for a free consultation.

hero.label: REAL ESTATE
hero.title: Professional Real Estate Services
hero.description: Sale, purchase and property management. We are your reliable partner in the real estate market.

sale.title: Property Sales
sale.description: We sell your property quickly and at the best price. Strategic marketing and targeted approach to buyers.

purchase.title: Property Purchase
purchase.description: We find the ideal property for you based on your requirements. Access to exclusive listings.

valuation.title: Property Valuation
valuation.description: Professional market price estimation. Free consultation and market analysis.

management.title: Property Management
management.description: Complete management and maintenance of your properties. Maximize your rental income.

cta.title: Looking for a property or selling?
cta.description: Our team of experienced professionals is here for you.

hero.label: FOR DEVELOPERS
hero.title: Partner for Your Development Projects
hero.description: We participate in development projects from study to final approval. A reliable partner with proven results.

consulting.title: Construction Consulting
consulting.description: Expert advice in the construction industry. Cost and process optimization.

realization.title: Project Realization
realization.description: Comprehensive implementation of development projects including subcontractor coordination.

marketing.title: Marketing & Sales
marketing.description: Marketing strategies and sales support for development projects.

cta.title: Have a development project?
cta.description: We'd love to meet with you and discuss cooperation opportunities.

hero.label: REFERENCES
hero.title: Our Projects Speak for Themselves
hero.description: Take a look at selected projects we have successfully completed. Quality and client satisfaction are our calling card.

hero.label: CONCRETE SCREEDS
hero.title: Premium Concrete Screeds
hero.description: Unique surface treatment for modern interiors and exteriors. Seamless, durable and aesthetically timeless.

seamless.title: Seamless Surface
seamless.description: No joints, no transitions. Clean minimalist look for your space.

durable.title: High Durability
durable.description: Extremely resistant to wear, water and chemicals. Lifespan of decades.

design.title: Design Flexibility
design.description: Wide range of colors and textures. Every realization is a unique work of art.

maintenance.title: Easy Maintenance
maintenance.description: Minimal maintenance requirements. Regular cleaning products are sufficient.

cta.title: Interested in concrete screeds?
cta.description: We'll be happy to prepare a non-binding custom quote for you.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: We'll be happy to answer any questions.
